headline: Is LyondellBasell Industries (LYB) Stock Outpacing Its Basic Materials Peers This Year?
summary: Here is how LyondellBasell (LYB) and Usinas Siderurgicas de Minas Gerais SA (USNZY) have performed compared to their sector so far this year.
